nasa_apod.title: Superplumes Inside Earth
nasa_apod.explanation: Why are there huge, unusual masses inside the Earth? No one is sure.  By noting how earthquakes rumble through our planet's interior, humanity has discovered two deep structures that appear to have unusual temperatures and/or chemical compositions.
